name: @messages-dev/sdk
description: Official TypeScript SDK for the messages.dev iMessage API. Send and receive iMessage and SMS messages from Node.js, Bun, and the browser.

scripts.build: bun run build:clean && bun run build:js && bun run build:types
scripts.build:js: bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir ./dist --target=browser --format=esm --external zod --sourcemap=linked && bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir ./dist --target=node --format=cjs --external zod --sourcemap=linked --entry-naming "[dir]/[name].cjs"
